summary: Tested the currency fee fix in Cart.tsx (commit ccf0032d). Verified that the card payment processing fee correctly uses the product's currency symbol (CA$ for CAD products, $ for USD products) instead of the previously hardcoded '$' USD symbol. Both the cart item fee line ('incl. CA$X.XX fee') and the Order Summary processing fee line ('Processing fee (5%) CA$X.XX') show the correct currency.
critical_code_review_comments: Line 187 of Cart.tsx: displayCurrency correctly derived from first product's currency field (|| 'USD' fallback is correct)
Line 486: fee display uses fmtMoney(item.pricing.fee, item.product.currency || displayCurrency) - FIX correctly applied
Lines 808-830: Order Summary section all uses displayCurrency consistently
Line 494: Line items in price breakdown also use item.product.currency || displayCurrency - correct
seed_data_creation: Created: 1 CAD product 'TEST_CAD_Service' (id=landing-page-build-10, price=CA$200) in testpartner242 tenant. Created mock Stripe and GoCardless oauth_connections for testpartner242 to enable payment methods. Reset customer user password to 'TestCustomer123!'. Reset partner admin password to 'ChangeMe123!'.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Currency fix verified. Test infra setup: tenant=testpartner242, customer email=test_bugfix242_customer@example.com (password=TestCustomer123!), CAD product id=landing-page-build-10. Mock Stripe/GoCardless connections added to enable payment method display. The cart item 'Add to Cart' flow requires navigating to the product page through the store (direct URL /product/{id} works after login). localStorage key for cart is 'aa_cart_items'.

test_1_cad_product_fee_currency.description: CAD product (CA$200) in cart with card payment selected

test_2_usd_regression.description: USD product ($100) in cart with card payment selected
